title: ACEF Risk Treatment Payload
description: Payload schema for risk_treatment records. Captures mitigation and control measures per EU AI Act Art. 9 and NIST MANAGE. Supports the risk_testing_log variant via the treatment_subtype discriminator field.

risk_id.description: Reference to the risk_register entry this treatment addresses.

control_description.description: Detailed description of the control or mitigation measure.

implementation_status.description: Current implementation status of the treatment.

responsible_party.description: Person or team responsible for implementing and maintaining this treatment.

effectiveness_assessment.description: Assessment of how effective this treatment is at reducing the risk.

verification_method.description: How the treatment's effectiveness is verified.

verification_date.description: Date of the last effectiveness verification (ISO 8601).

review_cycle_days.description: How frequently this treatment is reviewed, in days.

treatment_subtype.description: Discriminator for payload variants. 'testing_log' for risk_testing_log variant.

test_results.description: Results of the risk treatment testing (for risk_testing_log variant).

test_date.description: Date of the test (ISO 8601, for risk_testing_log variant).

cost_estimate.description: Estimated cost of implementing and maintaining this treatment.

residual_risk_after_treatment.description: Expected residual risk level after this treatment is applied.
